note: Add accepts name, position, autoFilter, tabColor, and hidden — these forward to the same code paths Set uses, preserving Add/Set symmetry. `freeze` remains Set-only.

name.description: sheet tab name. Returned path is /<name>; readback goes through DocumentNode.Path / .Preview rather than Format[].

autoFilter.description: range to apply AutoFilter on (e.g. A1:D10). `true` enables on used range.
autoFilter.readback: range string as stored, or boolean true

hidden.description: hide the sheet at creation or after the fact.

freeze.description: freeze panes anchor (cell ref). A2 freezes row 1; B1 freezes column A; B2 freezes row 1 + column A. `none` / `false` / empty removes the freeze. Set-only on existing sheets.
freeze.readback: top-left cell ref of frozen pane (e.g. A2); absent when no freeze

direction.description: RTL sheet layout (Arabic / Hebrew) — column A renders on the right, column scroll direction inverts. Maps to <sheetView rightToLeft=...>. Canonical key matches Word/PPT.
direction.readback: rtl when set; absent when default (ltr)

zoom.description: sheetView zoom percentage (10-400). Emitted only when non-default (≠100).

gridlines.description: sheetView gridline visibility. Emitted only when hidden (false); default-on is omitted (CONSISTENCY(default-omission)).

headings.description: row/column header visibility. Emitted only when hidden (false); default-on is omitted (CONSISTENCY(default-omission)).

visibility.description: workbook-level sheet state when not visible. Emitted alongside hidden=true; absent for default-visible sheets.

protect.description: sheet protection state. On Set: pass `true` to enable protection, `false` to disable. Use the separate `password` property to set/clear an Excel legacy password hash.

password.description: Excel legacy password hash for sheet protection (ECMA-376 14.7.1). On Set: pass plaintext password to hash and apply, or `none` to clear. Implicitly enables protection if not already set.

orientation.description: PageSetup orientation (portrait | landscape). Emitted only when set on the sheet.

fitToPage.description: PageSetup fit-to-page width x height (e.g. '1x1' = fit to one page).

printArea.description: defined-name _xlnm.Print_Area for this sheet, with the leading 'SheetName!' prefix stripped so the value round-trips as an A1 range.

header.description: odd-page header text (HeaderFooter/OddHeader). Excel format codes (&L, &C, &R, &P, &D, etc.) pass through verbatim.

footer.description: odd-page footer text (HeaderFooter/OddFooter). Excel format codes pass through verbatim.

sort.description: sort the sheet by one or more columns. Set input: comma-separated `Col [dir]` tokens, direction optional, defaults to asc (e.g. `A`, `A asc`, `A asc,B desc`). Use `none` to clear. Get readback: comma-separated `Col:dir` entries (colon-separated, e.g. `A:asc`).

rowBreaks.description: manual horizontal page breaks. Comma-separated row indices (1-based) where each break sits above that row.

colBreaks.description: manual vertical page breaks. Comma-separated column indices (1-based) where each break sits to the left of that column.
